records.ety: [F., fr. L. obstaculum, fr. obstare to withstand, oppose; ob (see Ob-) + stare to stand. See Stand. and cf. Oust, v.]

defs: That which stands in the way, or opposes; anything that hinders progress; a hindrance; an obstruction, physical or moral.
quotes: If all obstacles were cut away. And that my path were even to the crown.
